center.name: 西班牙地理
center.summary: 西班牙地理是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括白兀鷲，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In Spain and Morocco, summer roosts are formed mainly by immature birds

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In Spain and Morocco, summer roosts are formed mainly by immature birds
